svg.I:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
     width="1" height="4"
     viewBox="0 0 1 4">

<polyline points="0,3 0,3"
    fill="none"
    stroke="#000000"
    stroke-width="1"
    stroke-linejoin="miter"
    stroke-linecap="butt" />
</svg>
